topic: Ketosis benefits: brain fuel and cellular signaling
caption: Did you know ketosis can supercharge your brain? 💡 Ketones are the brain's preferred fuel source, increasing focus and mental clarity. 🧠 They also enhance cellular signaling, reducing inflammation. 🔥 Save this so you don't lose it. Tag a friend who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. #ketosis #brainfuel #cellularsignaling #inflammationreduction #mentalfocus #healthyliving #ketogenicdiet
